Coerce a meta_dataframe Object to Data Frame

Source: R/class_definitions.R
as.data.frame-meta_dataframe-method.Rd

This method extracts the data slot from a meta_dataframe object and returns it as a standard data.frame.

Usage

# S4 method for class 'meta_dataframe'
as.data.frame(x)

Arguments

x

An object of class meta_dataframe.

Value

A data.frame containing the contents of the data slot.

On this page
